name: Lab 08 Student Hostel Tool Use Agent - M Abdullah Fawad

assignments.name: messages
assignments.value: ={{ [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a Pakistani Student Hostel Planner. Use at most one tool per turn. Tools: room, transport, weather, currency. Never repeat a tool with the same arguments. If a requested fact is already in tool results, use it. When enough facts are collected, answer briefly.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.body.query } ] }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', messages: (() => { const raw = $json.messages || []; const compact = raw.length > 10 ? [raw[0], raw[1], ...raw.slice(-8)].filter(Boolean) : raw; const out = []; const validToolIds = new Set(); for (const m of compact) { if (!m || !m.role) continue; if (m.role === 'assistant' && Array.isArray(m.tool_calls)) { const calls = m.tool_calls.map(tc => { const name = tc.function?.name || tc.name || tc.tool_name; const id = tc.id || tc.tool_call_id; if (!name || !id) return null; const args = typeof tc.function?.arguments === 'string' ? tc.function.arguments : JSON.stringify(tc.function?.arguments || tc.arguments || {}); return { id, type: 'function', function: { name, arguments: args } }; }).filter(Boolean); if (calls.length) { calls.forEach(tc => validToolIds.add(tc.id)); out.push({ role: 'assistant', content: m.content ?? null, tool_calls: calls }); } else if (m.content) { out.push({ role: 'assistant', content: String(m.content) }); } continue; } if (m.role === 'tool') { if (m.tool_call_id && validToolIds.has(m.tool_call_id)) { out.push({ role: 'tool', tool_call_id: m.tool_call_id, content: typeof m.content === 'string' ? m.content : JSON.stringify(m.content || {}) }); } continue; } if (['system', 'user', 'assistant'].includes(m.role)) { out.push({ role: m.role, content: String(m.content ?? '') }); } } return out; })(), temperature: 0.1, max_tokens: 220, tool_choice: 'auto', parallel_tool_calls: false, tools: [ { type: 'function', function: { name: 'get_weather', description: 'Weather by city.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { city: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['city'] } } }, { type: 'function', function: { name: 'convert_currency', description: 'Convert money.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { amount: { type: 'number' }, from_currency: { type: 'string' }, to_currency: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['amount', 'from_currency', 'to_currency'] } } }, { type: 'function', function: { name: 'get_room_cost', description: 'Hostel room cost.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { city: { type: 'string' }, university: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['city', 'university'] } } }, { type: 'function', function: { name: 'get_transport_cost', description: 'Transport cost.', parameters: { type: 'object', properties: { from_city: { type: 'string' }, to_city: { type: 'string' } }, required: ['from_city', 'to_city'] } } } ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const calls = $json.tool_calls || $items('Turn Counter').at(-1).json.tool_calls || []; const fallback = calls.length ? 'Collected tool results: ' + calls.map(c => `${c.tool_name}: ${JSON.stringify(c.result || {})}`).join('; ') : 'Stopped after max turns. Try a shorter query or wait for the Groq TPM window to reset.'; return { answer: $json.final_answer || $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || fallback, tool_call_count: calls.length, tool_calls: calls, domain: 'Student Hostel Planner' }; })() }}
